hooks.command: FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty') && [ -n "$FILE" ] && [ -f "$FILE" ] && case "$FILE" in *.ts|*.tsx|*.js|*.jsx|*.json) pnpm biome check --write "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || true ;; esac
FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty') && [ -n "$FILE" ] && [ -f "$FILE" ] && case "$FILE" in *.ts|*.tsx) pnpm eslint --fix "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || true ;; esac

CMD=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty') && case "$CMD" in *'git commit'*) cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && pnpm lint 2>&1 || { echo 'BLOCK: pnpm lint failed. Fix lint errors before committing.' >&2; exit 2; } ;; esac
